step_rationale: NF-κB-mediated endothelial inflammation; platelet-derived mediator; atherosclerotic chemokine axis.
mechanism: CXCL12 activates endothelial NF-κB signaling, recruits immune cells to atherosclerotic plaques, and mediates platelet–thrombosis interactions.
